#### FDR-correction and summary {.tabset}

**RESULTS**:

**Hospital of recruitment**: 

1) ✔ Higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> between SJD and StPau at V1 and V2.

2) ✔✔ During pregnancy, SJD shows overall higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> levels compared with StPau. <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> trajectories differ depending on the hospital (Maternitat has sharper increase).

3) ✔ Across visits, SJD shows overall higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> levels compared with StPau.

**Baseline age of mother**: 

1) ✔ Older mothers have higher <span style="color:#1b9e77; font-weight:bold;">pTau217</span> (v4), higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span> (V1, V2, V3, V4) and higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> (V2). --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

2) ✔✖ During pregnancy, higher maternal age was significantly associated with higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>  and <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span>. --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

3) ✔ Across visits, higher maternal age was significantly associated with higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>. --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

**Ethnics**: 

1) ✔ "Not European" have higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> (V1, V4).

2) ✖✔ During pregnancy, different trajectories are found for <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span>.

3) ✖

**BMI**: 

1) ✔ Higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>  is associated with lower BMI (V4).

2) ✖✖

3) ✖

**Education**: 

1) ✖

2) ✖✖

3) ✖


**COVID groups**: 

1) ✖

2) ✖✔ During pregnancy, different trajectories are found for <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> (Group 2).

3) ✖

**Sex of the child**: 

1) ✖

2) ✖✖

3) ✖

**Parity**: 

1) ✔ Higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span> in multiparous women (V4). 

2) ✖✖

3) ✖

**APOE**: 

1) ✔ Higher <span style="color:#1b9e77; font-weight:bold;">pTau217</span> in APOE3/3 regarding APOE2/3 (V3). Higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>  in APOE4/4 regarding APOE2/3 across visits. (Consider low "n")  --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

2) ✔✔ During pregnancy, APOE4/4 show significantly higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>  levels regarding APOE2/3. Different trajectories are found for each genotype. (Consider low "n") --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

3) ✖ Across visits, APOE4/4 show significantly higher <span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>  levels regarding APOE2/3. (Consider low "n") --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

**Delivery type**: 

1) ✖

2) ✖✖

3) ✖

**Storage time**

1) ✔ Higher <span style="color:#1b9e77; font-weight:bold;">pTau217</span> in samples 6-24 h (V1), higher<span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span> in samples >24 h (V1), higher <span style="color:#7570b3; font-weight:bold;">GFAP</span> in samples 6-24 h (V2). --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR (>24 h)

2) ✔✖ During pregnancy, samples 6-24 h show higher <span style="color:#1b9e77; font-weight:bold;">pTau217</span>, and samples >24h show higher<span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>. --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

3) ✔ Across visits, samples 6-24 h show higher <span style="color:#1b9e77; font-weight:bold;">pTau217</span> and  samples >24h show higher<span style="color:#d95f02; font-weight:bold;">NfL</span>. --> ✅ IT SURVIVES FDR

**PMA** was exploratory and will be further analyzed (not as a determinant)

```{r delivery fdrcorrr, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
# FDR grouped by biomarker and by models
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

############################################################
# Combine all model results
############################################################

all_tests <- map_dfr(
  results,
  ~ bind_rows(
    .x$pregnancy,
    .x$pregnancy_int,
    .x$postpartum,
    bind_rows(.x$cross)
  )
)

############################################################
# Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction
############################################################

all_tests_fdr <- all_tests %>%
  mutate(
    family = case_when(
      grepl("^Cross", Model) ~ "Cross-sectional",
      Model == "Pregnancy" ~ "Pregnancy longitudinal",
      Model == "Pregnancy Interaction" ~ "Pregnancy interaction",
      Model == "Postpartum" ~ "Postpartum longitudinal",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(family) %>%
  mutate(
    q_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    q_signif = case_when(
      q_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      q_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      q_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    q_display = paste0(
      sprintf("%.3f", q_value),
      q_signif
    )
  )

############################################################
# Number of tests
############################################################

cat(" Number of hypothesis tests by model\n\n")

tbl1 <-

  all_tests_fdr %>%

  count(Model) %>%

  kbl(
    format = "html",
    caption = "Number of hypothesis tests per model."
  ) %>%

  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    ),
    full_width = FALSE
  )

print(tbl1)

cat("<br><br>")

############################################################
# FDR table
############################################################

cat(" False Discovery Rate correction\n\n")

tbl2 <-

  all_tests_fdr %>%

  dplyr::select(
    family,
    Model,
    biomarker,
    determinant,
    term,
    estimate,
    std.error,
    statistic,
    p.value,
    q_display
  ) %>%

  rename(
    Family = family,
    Biomarker = biomarker,
    Determinant = determinant,
    Term = term,
    Estimate = estimate,
    `Std. Error` = std.error,
    Statistic = statistic,
    `Raw p` = p.value,
    `FDR q` = q_display
  ) %>%

  kbl(
    format = "html",
    digits = 3,
    escape = FALSE,
    caption = "Benjamini-Hochberg False Discovery Rate (FDR) corrected results."
  ) %>%

  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    ),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "left"
  ) %>%

  scroll_box(
    width = "100%",
    height = "600px"
  )

print(tbl2)

```


### 2.3. Additional exploratory analyses {.tabset}

#### Univariate mixed model {.tabset}

This section explores potential covariates that may influence biomarker levels in the cohort, helping identify possible confounders for subsequent analyses (effect of maternal determinants and gestational age on biomarker levels across pregnancy and postpartum visits).

- **Test**: Mixed-effects model (lmer)  `Biomarker ~ Covariate + (1 | id_bisc)`

##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r covptau217 univariate, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest) 
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

covariates <- c(
  "GA_weeks", 
  "age_12w_m",
  "sex_0y_c",
  "bmi_m_12w",
  "ethnicity_m_2cat",
  "educ_level_m_2cat",
  "hosp_recruit_m_12w",
  "hospital_delivery",
  "covid_frontier_m_3c",
  "parity_m_2cat",
  "delivery_type_m_2cat"
)

bio <- "log_pTau217"

uni_results <- map_dfr(covariates, function(cov) {

  fml <- as.formula(paste0(bio, " ~ ", cov, " + (1 | id_bisc)"))

  mod <- lmer(fml, data = long_df, REML = TRUE)

  coef_table <- as.data.frame(summary(mod)$coefficients)
  coef_table$term <- rownames(coef_table)

  coef_table %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      covariate = cov,

      estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
      statistic = round(`t value`, 2),
      p_raw = `Pr(>|t|)`,

      p.value_fmt = case_when(
        is.na(p_raw) ~ NA_character_,
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_raw)
      ),

      signif = case_when(
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_raw < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_raw < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
})

uni_results %>%
  select(covariate, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value_fmt, signif) %>%
  arrange(covariate) %>%
  kable(
    format = "html",
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Covariate", "Term", "Estimate", "Std.Err", "t value", "p value", "Signif")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
```
##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r covnfl univariate, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
bio <- "log_NFL"

uni_results <- map_dfr(covariates, function(cov) {

  fml <- as.formula(paste0(bio, " ~ ", cov, " + (1 | id_bisc)"))

  mod <- lmer(fml, data = long_df, REML = TRUE)

  coef_table <- as.data.frame(summary(mod)$coefficients)
  coef_table$term <- rownames(coef_table)

  coef_table %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      covariate = cov,

      estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
      statistic = round(`t value`, 2),
      p_raw = `Pr(>|t|)`,

      p.value_fmt = case_when(
        is.na(p_raw) ~ NA_character_,
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_raw)
      ),

      signif = case_when(
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_raw < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_raw < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
})

uni_results %>%
  select(covariate, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value_fmt, signif) %>%
  arrange(covariate) %>%
  kable(
    format = "html",
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Covariate", "Term", "Estimate", "Std.Err", "t value", "p value", "Signif")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r covgfap univariate, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
bio <- "log_GFAP"

uni_results <- map_dfr(covariates, function(cov) {

  fml <- as.formula(paste0(bio, " ~ ", cov, " + (1 | id_bisc)"))

  mod <- lmer(fml, data = long_df, REML = TRUE)

  coef_table <- as.data.frame(summary(mod)$coefficients)
  coef_table$term <- rownames(coef_table)

  coef_table %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      covariate = cov,

      estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
      statistic = round(`t value`, 2),
      p_raw = `Pr(>|t|)`,

      p.value_fmt = case_when(
        is.na(p_raw) ~ NA_character_,
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_raw)
      ),

      signif = case_when(
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_raw < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_raw < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
})

uni_results %>%
  select(covariate, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value_fmt, signif) %>%
  arrange(covariate) %>%
  kable(
    format = "html",
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Covariate", "Term", "Estimate", "Std.Err", "t value", "p value", "Signif")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
```

#### Multivariate mixed model {.tabset}

This section explores potential covariates that may influence biomarker levels in the cohort, helping identify possible confounders for subsequent analyses (effect of maternal determinants and gestational age on biomarker levels across pregnancy and postpartum visits).

- **Test**: Mixed-effects model (lmer)  `Biomarker ~ All covariates + (1 | id_bisc)`

##### pTau217 {.tabset}
```{r covptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
bio_colors <- c( "log_pTau217" = "#1b9e77", "log_NFL" = "#d95f02", "log_GFAP" = "#7570b3" )

run_biomarker_analysis <- function(
  bio,
  long_df,
  covariates,
  bio_colors,
  group_vars = c(
    "sex_0y_c",
    "ethnicity_m_2cat",
    "educ_level_m_2cat",
    "hosp_recruit_m_12w",
    "hospital_delivery",
    "covid_frontier_m_3c",
    "parity_m_2cat",
    "delivery_type_m_2cat"
  )
) {

  library(dplyr)
  library(broom.mixed)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  # -----------------------------
  # Visit order
  # -----------------------------
  long_df$Visit <- factor(long_df$Visit, levels = c("v1","v2","v3","v4"))
  contrasts(long_df$Visit) <- contr.treatment(4, base = 1)

  # -----------------------------
  # MODEL
  # -----------------------------
  formula_str <- paste0(
    bio, " ~ ",
    paste(covariates, collapse = " + "),
    "+ (1 | id_bisc)"
  )

  cat("<pre>Full model formula: ", formula_str, "</pre>\n")

  model <- lmer(as.formula(formula_str), data = long_df, REML = TRUE)

  tidy_res <- broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(std.error, 3),
      statistic = round(statistic, 2),
      p_raw = p.value,
      p.value = ifelse(p_raw < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_raw)),
      signif = case_when(
        p_raw < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_raw < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_raw < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )

  # -----------------------------
  # TABLE
  # -----------------------------
  print(
    tidy_res %>%
      select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, signif) %>%
      kable(format = "html", escape = FALSE,
            col.names = c("Covariate", "Estimate", "SE", "t", "p", "Sig.")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  col <- bio_colors[bio]

  # -----------------------------
  # GA plot
  # -----------------------------
  print(
    ggplot(long_df, aes(x = GA_weeks, y = .data[[bio]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = col) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = paste0(bio, " vs GA"))
  )

  # -----------------------------
  # Visit plot
  # -----------------------------
  print(
    ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Visit, y = .data[[bio]])) +
      geom_boxplot(fill = col, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, color = col) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = paste0(bio, " by Visit"))
  )

  # -----------------------------
  # Covariate plots
  # -----------------------------
  for(cov in covariates[-1]){

    if(cov %in% colnames(long_df)){

      if(is.numeric(long_df[[cov]])){

        p <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = .data[[cov]], y = .data[[bio]])) +
          geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = col) +
          geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
          theme_minimal() +
          labs(title = paste0(bio, " vs ", cov))

      } else {

        p <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = .data[[cov]], y = .data[[bio]])) +
          geom_boxplot(fill = col, alpha = 0.4) +
          geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, color = col) +
          theme_minimal() +
          labs(title = paste0(bio, " by ", cov))
      }

      print(p)
    }
  }

# -----------------------------
# LONGITUDINAL GROUP PLOTS (TWO PER VARIABLE)
# -----------------------------
for(g in group_vars){

  if(g %in% colnames(long_df)){

    df_tmp <- long_df %>%
      mutate(group_var = as.factor(.data[[g]]))

    # =============================
    # PLOT 1: VISIT (structured time)
    # =============================
    print(

      ggplot(df_tmp,
             aes(x = Visit,
                 y = .data[[bio]],
                 group = id_bisc,
                 color = group_var)) +

        # spaghetti
        geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +

        geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +

        # GROUP MEAN TRAJECTORY
        stat_summary(
          aes(group = group_var),
          fun = mean,
          geom = "line",
          linewidth = 1.3
        ) +

        stat_summary(
          aes(group = group_var),
          fun = mean,
          geom = "point",
          size = 2
        ) +

        theme_minimal() +

        labs(
          title = paste0(bio, " trajectories by ", g, " (Visit)"),
          x = "Visit",
          y = bio,
          color = g
        )
    )

    # =============================
    # PLOT 2: GA weeks (irregular time)
    # =============================
    print(

      ggplot(df_tmp,
             aes(x = GA_weeks,
                 y = .data[[bio]],
                 group = id_bisc,
                 color = group_var)) +

        # spaghetti ONLY (no smoothing)
        geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +

        geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +

        theme_minimal() +

        labs(
          title = paste0(bio, " trajectories by ", g, " (GA weeks)"),
          x = "Gestational age (weeks)",
          y = bio,
          color = g
        )
    )
  }
}

} 

# RUN
run_biomarker_analysis("log_pTau217", long_df, covariates, bio_colors)
```

##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r covNFL, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_biomarker_analysis("log_NFL", long_df, covariates, bio_colors)
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r covGFAP, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_biomarker_analysis("log_GFAP", long_df, covariates, bio_colors)
```



#### Preeclampsia and angiogenic factors {.tabset}

```{r preeclampsia ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

long_df_tmp <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    C_pree_num = case_when(
      C_pree %in% c(1, "1", "Yes", "yes") ~ 1,
      C_pree %in% c(0, "0", "No", "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    C_peeg_num = case_when(
      C_peeg %in% c(1, "1", "Yes", "yes") ~ 1,
      C_peeg %in% c(0, "0", "No", "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    C_hel_num = case_when(
      C_hel %in% c(1, "1", "Yes", "yes") ~ 1,
      C_hel %in% c(0, "0", "No", "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    pe_total_num = case_when(
      pe_total_m %in% c(1, "1", "Yes", "yes") ~ 1,
      pe_total_m %in% c(0, "0", "No", "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    hdp_denovo_num = case_when(
      hdp_denovo_m %in% c(1, "1", "Yes", "yes") ~ 1,
      hdp_denovo_m %in% c(0, "0", "No", "no") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# =========================================================
# 1. PREECLAMPSIA DEFINITION (SAFE, ONCE ONLY)
# =========================================================

long_df_tmp <- long_df_tmp %>%
  mutate(
    preeclampsia = case_when(
      C_pree_num == 1 ~ 1,
      C_peeg_num == 1 ~ 1,
      C_hel_num  == 1 ~ 1,
      pe_total_num == 1 ~ 1,
      hdp_denovo_num == 1 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

# =========================================================
# 2. CHECK CASES
# =========================================================

cat("Preeclampsia distribution")

table(long_df_tmp$preeclampsia) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# =========================================================
# 3. SINGLE BIOMARKER ANALYSIS
# =========================================================

biomarker_var <- "sflt1.plgf_m_32w_log2"

df <- long_df_tmp %>%
  select(Visit, id_bisc, preeclampsia, all_of(biomarker_var)) %>%
  mutate(
    value = as.numeric(.data[[biomarker_var]])
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

# -----------------------------
# Summary table (single biomarker)
# -----------------------------
summary_table_1 <- df %>%
  group_by(Visit, preeclampsia) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean = mean(value),
    SD = sd(value),
    Median = median(value),
    IQR = IQR(value),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = ifelse(preeclampsia == 1, "PE", "No PE")) %>%
  select(Visit, Group, N, Mean, SD, Median, IQR)

# -----------------------------
# p-values (safe)
# -----------------------------
p_values <- df %>%
  group_by(Visit) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(value ~ preeclampsia)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table_1 <- summary_table_1 %>%
  left_join(p_values, by = "Visit")

# -----------------------------
# TABLE
# -----------------------------
cat("Biomarker vs PE (by Visit) - angiogenic factors: log2 ratio of sFlt-1 and PlGF (higher ratio -> higher probability of preeclampsia)")

summary_table_1 %>%
  mutate(p_value = signif(p_value, 3)) %>%
  kable("html", digits = 3) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# -----------------------------
# PLOT (single biomarker)
# -----------------------------
ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(preeclampsia), y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = factor(preeclampsia))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Visit) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("No PE", "PE")) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "log2 ratio sFlt-1 / PlGF",
    title = "sFlt-1/PlGF ratio by preeclampsia status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# =========================================================
# 4. MULTI-BIOMARKER ANALYSIS
# =========================================================

bio_colors <- c(
  "log_pTau217" = "#1b9e77",
  "log_NFL"     = "#d95f02",
  "log_GFAP"    = "#7570b3"
)

df_bio <- long_df_tmp %>%
  select(id_bisc, Visit, preeclampsia,
         log_pTau217, log_NFL, log_GFAP) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(log_pTau217, log_NFL, log_GFAP),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(value = as.numeric(value)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

# -----------------------------
# Summary table
# -----------------------------
summary_table_2 <- df_bio %>%
  group_by(biomarker, preeclampsia) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean = mean(value),
    SD = sd(value),
    Median = median(value),
    IQR = IQR(value),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = ifelse(preeclampsia == 1, "PE", "No PE")) %>%
  select(biomarker, Group, N, Mean, SD, Median, IQR)

# -----------------------------
# p-values
# -----------------------------
p_vals <- df_bio %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(value ~ preeclampsia)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table_2 <- summary_table_2 %>%
  left_join(p_vals, by = "biomarker")

# -----------------------------
# TABLE
# -----------------------------

cat("Biomarkers vs PE (preeclampsia group not measured with angiogenic factors)")

summary_table_2 %>%
  mutate(p_value = signif(p_value, 3)) %>%
  kable("html", digits = 3) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# -----------------------------
# PLOT (multi biomarker)
# -----------------------------
ggplot(df_bio, aes(x = factor(preeclampsia), y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = biomarker),
               outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = biomarker),
              width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(biomarker ~ Visit, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bio_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = bio_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("No PE", "PE")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# =========================================================
# 5. SPAGHETTI PLOT (PE ONLY)
# =========================================================

df_pe <- df_bio %>%
  filter(preeclampsia == 1)

ggplot(df_pe, aes(x = Visit, y = value, group = id_bisc, color = id_bisc)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Spaghetti plots — PE cases (colored by participant)",
    x = "Visit",
    y = "Biomarker value"
  )

# =========================================================
# 6. SPAGHETTI PLOT (PE AND NO PE)
# =========================================================
df_spag <- df_bio %>%
  mutate(
    Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1", "v2", "v3", "v4")),
    preeclampsia = factor(preeclampsia, levels = c(0, 1),
                          labels = c("No PE", "PE")),
    id_bisc = factor(id_bisc)
  )

ggplot(df_spag, aes(x = Visit, y = value, group = id_bisc)) +
  geom_line(aes(color = preeclampsia), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point(aes(color = preeclampsia), alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("No PE" = "#4D4D4D", "PE" = "#D95F02")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Longitudinal trajectories: PE vs No PE",
    x = "Visit",
    y = "Biomarker value"
  )

```


#### Prematurity {.tabset}

```{r prematurity, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,fig.show='hold', fig.keep='all'}
############################################################
# PRETERM vs TERM ANALYSIS
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(kableExtra)
library(patchwork)

############################################################
# Biomarker colours
############################################################

bio_colors <- c(

  log_pTau217="#1b9e77",
  log_NFL="#d95f02",
  log_GFAP="#7570b3"

)

############################################################
# Create preterm variable
############################################################

long_df <- long_df %>%

  group_by(id_bisc) %>%

  mutate(

    delivery_ga = first(
      na.omit(
        GA_weeks[Visit=="v3"]
      )
    ),

    preterm = case_when(

      delivery_ga < 37 ~ "Preterm",

      delivery_ga >= 37 ~ "Term",

      TRUE ~ NA_character_

    )

  ) %>%

  ungroup()

long_df$preterm <-

factor(

long_df$preterm,

levels=c("Term","Preterm")

)

############################################################
# Sample size
############################################################

cat("<h2>Prematurity</h2>")

cat("<h3>Participants</h3>")

long_df %>%

distinct(
id_bisc,
preterm
) %>%

count(preterm) %>%

kable(
format="html",
caption="Participants per group"
) %>%

kable_styling(
full_width=FALSE
)

############################################################
# Biomarkers
############################################################

biomarkers <- c(

"log_pTau217",

"log_NFL",

"log_GFAP"

)

############################################################
# Loop
############################################################

for(bio in biomarkers){

cat("<hr>")

cat(

paste0(

"<h2>",

bio,

"</h2>"

)

)

############################################################
# Pregnancy trajectories
############################################################

df_traj <-

long_df %>%

filter(

Visit %in% c("v1","v2","v3"),

!is.na(preterm),

!is.na(.data[[bio]])

)

############################################################
# Model
############################################################

model <-

lmer(

as.formula(

paste0(

bio,

" ~ preterm*GA_weeks + (1|id_bisc)"

)

),

data=df_traj

)

cat("<h3>Linear mixed-effects model</h3>")

cat("<b>Model</b><br>")

knitr::kable(

data.frame(

Formula=

deparse(formula(model))

),

format="html"

)

broom.mixed::tidy(

model,

effects="fixed"

) %>%

mutate(

across(

where(is.numeric),

~round(.,3)

)

) %>%

kable(

format="html",

caption="Fixed effects"

) %>%

kable_styling(

full_width=FALSE

)

############################################################
# Boxplots
############################################################

cat("<h3>Postpartum biomarker distributions</h3>")

df_box <-

long_df %>%

filter(

Visit %in% c("v3","v4"),

!is.na(preterm),

!is.na(.data[[bio]])

)

p_v3 <-

ggplot(

filter(df_box,Visit=="v3"),

aes(

preterm,

.data[[bio]],

fill=preterm

)

)+

geom_boxplot(

alpha=.7,

outlier.shape=NA

)+

geom_jitter(

width=.15,

alpha=.35

)+

scale_fill_manual(

values=c(

Term="#4daf4a",

Preterm="#e41a1c"

)

)+

theme_minimal()+

theme(

legend.position="none"

)+

labs(

title="Visit 3",

x="",

y=bio

)

p_v4 <-

ggplot(

filter(df_box,Visit=="v4"),

aes(

preterm,

.data[[bio]],

fill=preterm

)

)+

geom_boxplot(

alpha=.7,

outlier.shape=NA

)+

geom_jitter(

width=.15,

alpha=.35

)+

scale_fill_manual(

values=c(

Term="#4daf4a",

Preterm="#e41a1c"

)

)+

theme_minimal()+

theme(

legend.position="none"

)+

labs(

title="Visit 4",

x="",

y=NULL

)

############################################################
# Trajectories
############################################################

cat("<h3>Pregnancy trajectories</h3>")

p_spag <-

ggplot(

df_traj,

aes(

GA_weeks,

.data[[bio]],

group=id_bisc,

color=preterm

)

)+

geom_line(

alpha=.18

)+

scale_color_manual(

values=c(

Term="#4daf4a",

Preterm="#e41a1c"

)

)+

theme_minimal()+

labs(

title="Individual trajectories",

x="Gestational age (weeks)",

y=bio

)

p_mean <-

ggplot(

df_traj,

aes(

GA_weeks,

.data[[bio]],

color=preterm

)

)+

geom_smooth(

method="loess",

se=TRUE,

linewidth=1.4

)+

scale_color_manual(

values=c(

Term="#4daf4a",

Preterm="#e41a1c"

)

)+

theme_minimal()+

labs(

title="Estimated trajectories",

x="Gestational age (weeks)",

y=NULL

)

############################################################
# Print figures
############################################################

print(

p_v3 +

p_v4 +

plot_layout(ncol=2)

)

print(

p_spag +

p_mean +

plot_layout(ncol=2)

)

}
```

### 2.4. Cognition and behaviour {.tabset}

#### PMA {.tabset}

```{r PMA, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_pma_biomarker <- function(df, biomarker, pma_var){

  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(broom)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  #----------------------------------
  # Filter V2
  #----------------------------------
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Visit == "v2") %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
      !is.na(.data[[pma_var]])
    )

  #----------------------------------
  # Storage variable
  #----------------------------------
  storage_var <- ifelse(
    biomarker == "log_pTau217",
    "bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w",
    "bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w"
  )

  #----------------------------------
  # Model
  #----------------------------------
  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(
      pma_var,
      " ~ ",
      biomarker,
      " + age_12w_m + ",
      "hosp_recruit_m_12w + educ_level_m_2cat + GA_weeks + ",
      storage_var
    )
  )
  m <- lm(fml, data = df)

  #----------------------------------
# HEADER
#----------------------------------

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Model (v2):</div>")

cat(
  "<pre>",
  paste(deparse(fml), collapse = " "),
  "</pre>"
)

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N = </b>", nobs(m),
    " &nbsp;&nbsp; <b>Adj R² = </b>",
    round(summary(m)$adj.r.squared, 3),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

  #----------------------------------
  # TABLE (CRITICAL FIX)
  #----------------------------------
  tab <- broom::tidy(m)

  tbl <- tab %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(std.error, 3),
      statistic = round(statistic, 2),
      p_fmt = ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p_fmt, signif)

  tbl_html <-
  kable(
    tbl,
    format = "html",
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Term","Beta","SE","t","p","Sig.")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )

print(tbl_html)

  #----------------------------------
  # PLOT
  #----------------------------------
  p <- ggplot(df,
              aes(
                x = .data[[biomarker]],
                y = .data[[pma_var]]
              )) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#2C7FB8") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    labs(x = biomarker, y = pma_var)
  print(p)
  cat("<hr>")
  invisible(m)
}
```


##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r pmaa ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_pma_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_pTau217",
  pma_var = "pma_tcorrect_m_32w"
)
```

##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r pmaa nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_pma_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_NFL",
  pma_var = "pma_tcorrect_m_32w"
)
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r pmaa gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_pma_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_GFAP",
  pma_var = "pma_tcorrect_m_32w"
)
```


#### ADHD {.tabset}

We will use LM instead of the proposed Negative Binomial, since the distribution is not that zero-inflated (and has 3.3% of zeros).

```{r ADHD, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
run_adhd_biomarker <- function(df, biomarker, adhd_var){
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(broom)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Filter (Visit v2 only)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Visit == "v4") %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
      !is.na(.data[[adhd_var]])
    )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Storage variable
  # --------------------------------------------------
  storage_var <- ifelse(
    biomarker == "log_pTau217",
    "bl_edta.time.col.freez_c_4y",
    "bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y"
  )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Model formula
  # --------------------------------------------------
  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(
      adhd_var, " ~ ",
      biomarker, " + ",
      "age_12w_m + ",
      "hosp_recruit_m_12w + ",
      "educ_level_m_2cat + GA_weeks + ",
      storage_var
    )
  )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Fit model
  # --------------------------------------------------
  m <- lm(fml, data = df)

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Header
  # --------------------------------------------------

  cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Model (v4):</div>")
  cat("<pre>", deparse(fml), "</pre><br>")

  cat(
    paste0(
      "<b>N = </b>", nobs(m),
      " &nbsp;&nbsp; <b>Adj R² = </b>",
      round(summary(m)$adj.r.squared, 3),
      "<br><br>"
    )
  )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # TABLE (IMPORTANT FIX)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  tab <- broom::tidy(m)

  tbl <- tab %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(std.error, 3),
      statistic = round(statistic, 2),
      p_fmt = ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p_fmt, signif)

  print(
    knitr::kable(
      tbl,
      format = "html",
      escape = FALSE,
      col.names = c("Term","Beta","SE","t","p","Sig."),
      align = "lccccc"
    ) %>%
      kableExtra::kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed")
      )
  )

  cat("<br>")

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # PLOT (always shown)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  p <- ggplot(df,
              aes(
                x = .data[[biomarker]],
                y = .data[[adhd_var]]
              )) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#FFC0CB") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      x = biomarker,
      y = adhd_var
    )

  print(p)

  cat("<hr>")

  invisible(m)
}
```


##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r ADHD ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_adhd_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_pTau217",
  adhd_var = "adhd_rs_totalscore_m_48m"
)
```

##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r ADHD nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_adhd_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_NFL",
  adhd_var = "adhd_rs_totalscore_m_48m"
)
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r ADHD gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_adhd_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_GFAP",
  adhd_var = "adhd_rs_totalscore_m_48m"
)
```

#### PSI-SF {.tabset}

Since at 12w it is another version of the test, we can't do longirudinal analyses, right?

```{r psisf cross, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,fig.show='hold', fig.keep='all'}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

run_psisf_biomarker <- function(df, biomarker, psi_var){

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Filter (Visit v4 only)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  df <- df %>%
    filter(
      Visit == "v4",
      !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
      !is.na(.data[[psi_var]])
    )
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Storage variable
  # --------------------------------------------------
  storage_var <- ifelse(
    biomarker == "log_pTau217",
    "bl_edta.time.col.freez_c_4y",
    "bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y"
  )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Model
  # --------------------------------------------------
  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(
      psi_var, " ~ ",
      biomarker, " + ",
      "age_12w_m + ",
      "hosp_recruit_m_12w + ",
      "educ_level_m_2cat + ",
      "GA_weeks + ",
      storage_var
    )
  )
  m <- lm(fml, data=df)

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Header
  # --------------------------------------------------
  cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Model (v4):</div>")

  cat("<pre>")
  cat(paste(deparse(fml, width.cutoff=500), collapse="\n"))
  cat("</pre><br>")
  cat(
    paste0(
      "<b>N = </b>", nobs(m),
      " &nbsp;&nbsp; ",
      "<b>Adj R² = </b>",
      round(summary(m)$adj.r.squared,3),
      "<br><br>"
    )
  )

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Regression table
  # --------------------------------------------------
  tab <- broom::tidy(m)
  tbl <- tab %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate,3),
      std.error = round(std.error,3),
      statistic = round(statistic,2),
      p_fmt = ifelse(
        p.value < 0.001,
        "<0.001",
        sprintf("%.3f",p.value)
      ),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    select(
      term,
      estimate,
      std.error,
      statistic,
      p_fmt,
      signif
    )

  print(

    kable(
      tbl,
      format="html",
      escape=FALSE,
      col.names=c(
        "Term",
        "Beta",
        "SE",
        "t",
        "p",
        "Sig."
      ),
      align="lccccc"
    ) %>%

      kable_styling(
        full_width=FALSE,
        bootstrap_options=c(
          "striped",
          "hover",
          "condensed"
        )
      )
  )
  cat("<br>")

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Plot
  # --------------------------------------------------
  p <-
    ggplot(
      df,
      aes(
        x=.data[[biomarker]],
        y=.data[[psi_var]]
      )
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha=.6,
      size=2
    )+
    geom_smooth(
      method="lm",
      se=TRUE,
      color="#CBC3E3"
    )+
    theme_minimal(base_size=13)+
    labs(
      x=biomarker,
      y=psi_var
    )
  print(p)
  cat("<hr>")
  invisible(m)
}
```


##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r OSISF ptau217 nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_psisf_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_pTau217",
  psi_var = "psisf_global_score_m_48m"
)
```

##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r OSISF nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_psisf_biomarker(
  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_NFL",
  psi_var = "psisf_global_score_m_48m"
)
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r OSISF gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}

  df = long_df,
  biomarker = "log_GFAP",
  psi_var = "psisf_global_score_m_48m"
)
```

#### EPDS {.tabset}

We will compute the variable "number of high" risk of depression at 12w+epds_risk_m_32w_mod (pregnancy and across postpartum time-points).

No data of depression pre-pregnancy. No clear proxy either.

```{r epdss, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,fig.show='hold', fig.keep='all'}
library(dplyr)

##################################################
# Create EPDS_RISK_PRE and EPDS_RISK_POST
# and fill for all rows per participant
##################################################

long_df <- long_df %>%
  group_by(id_bisc) %>%
  mutate(
    ##############################################
    # PRE: prenatal EPDS risk at 32w
    ##############################################
    EPDS_RISK_PRE = first(
      na.omit(epds_risk_m_32w_mod)
    ),

    ##############################################
    # POST:
    # number of postpartum periods ever HIGH
    ##############################################

    EPDS_RISK_POST = {
      high_2m <- any(
        epds.risk_m_2m_6c_mod == "High",
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
      high_12m <- any(
        epds.risk_m_12m_6c_mod == "High",
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
      high_18m <- any(
        epds.risk_m_18m_6c_mod == "High",
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
      sum(
        high_2m,
        high_12m,
        high_18m
      )
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


##################################################
# QC: unique participants
##################################################

# number with PRE-NATAL (32w) filled

#long_df %>%
#  distinct(id_bisc, EPDS_RISK_PRE) %>%
#  summarise(
#    n_PRE = sum(!is.na(EPDS_RISK_PRE))
#  )


# number with POST-PREGNANCY filled

#long_df %>%
#  distinct(id_bisc, EPDS_RISK_POST) %>%
#  summarise(
#    n_POST = sum(!is.na(EPDS_RISK_POST))
#  )


##################################################
# distributions (participant-level)
##################################################

#long_df %>%
#  distinct(
#    id_bisc,
#    EPDS_RISK_PRE
#  ) %>%
#  count(
#    EPDS_RISK_PRE,
#    .drop=FALSE
#  )

#long_df %>%
#  distinct(
#    id_bisc,
#    EPDS_RISK_POST
#  ) %>%
#  count(
#    EPDS_RISK_POST,
#    .drop=FALSE
#  )

# TRANSFORM INTO FACTORS
long_df <- long_df %>%

  mutate(

    EPDS_RISK_PRE = factor(
      EPDS_RISK_PRE,
      levels=c("Low","Middle","High"),
      ordered=TRUE
    ),

    EPDS_RISK_POST = case_when(
      EPDS_RISK_POST==0 ~ "0",
      EPDS_RISK_POST==1 ~ "1",
      EPDS_RISK_POST>=2 ~ "2+",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    EPDS_RISK_POST=factor(
      EPDS_RISK_POST,
      levels=c("0","1","2+"),
      ordered=TRUE
    )
  )
##################################################################################################################################################
######################################################################### CROSS-SECTIONAL ANALYSIS ###############################################
##################################################################################################################################################

run_epds_cross <- function(df,
                           biomarker,
                           visit = c("v2","v3")){

  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(broom)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  visit <- match.arg(visit)

  ############################################################
  ## Select visit + predictor + storage variable
  ############################################################

  if(visit == "v2"){
    dat <- df %>%
      filter(
        Visit == "v2",
        !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
        !is.na(EPDS_RISK_PRE)
      )
    predictor <- "EPDS_RISK_PRE"

    storage_var <-
      ifelse(
        biomarker == "log_pTau217",
        "bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w",
        "bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w"
      )
    visit_label <- "v2 (32 weeks): Prenatal EPDS risk"
  }else{
    dat <- df %>%
      filter(
        Visit == "v3",
        !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
        !is.na(EPDS_RISK_POST)
      )

    predictor <- "EPDS_RISK_POST"

    storage_var <-
      ifelse(
        biomarker == "log_pTau217",
        "bl_time.col.store.edta_m_0y",
        "bl_time.col.store.plas_m_0y"
      )

    visit_label <- "v3 (y0): Number of postpartum high-risk EPDS episodes"

  }

  ############################################################
  ## Model
  ############################################################

  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(
      biomarker,
      " ~ ",
      predictor,
      " + age_12w_m + ",
      "hosp_recruit_m_12w + ",
      "educ_level_m_2cat + ",
      "GA_weeks + ",
      storage_var
    )
  )

  m <- lm(fml, data = dat)

  ############################################################
  ## Header
  ############################################################

  cat("<hr>")
  cat(
    paste0(
      "<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;'>",
      biomarker,
      " — ",
      visit_label,
      "</div><br>"
    )
  )

  cat("<b>Model</b><br>")
  cat("<pre>")
  cat(
    paste(
      deparse(fml, width.cutoff = 500),
      collapse = "\n"
    )
  )
  cat("</pre>")

  cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N:</b> ",
    dplyr::n_distinct(df$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ",
    nrow(df),
    "<br>",
    "<b>Adj. R² = </b>",
    round(summary(m)$adj.r.squared, 3),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

  ############################################################
  ## Regression coefficients
  ############################################################

  tab <-
    broom::tidy(m) %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate,3),
      std.error = round(std.error,3),
      statistic = round(statistic,2),
      p_fmt = ifelse(
        p.value < .001,
        "<0.001",
        sprintf("%.3f",p.value)
      ),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < .001 ~ "***",
        p.value < .01 ~ "**",
        p.value < .05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )

  print(
    tab %>%
      select(
        term,
        estimate,
        std.error,
        statistic,
        p_fmt,
        signif
      ) %>%
      kbl(
        format = "html",
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = c(
          "Term",
          "Beta",
          "SE",
          "t",
          "p",
          "Sig."
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c(
          "striped",
          "hover",
          "condensed"
        )
      )
  )

  ############################################################
  ## Overall ANOVA
  ############################################################

  cat("<br><b>Overall model effects</b><br>")

  anova_tab <-
    broom::tidy(anova(m)) %>%
    mutate(
      p_fmt = ifelse(
        p.value < .001,
        "<0.001",
        sprintf("%.3f",p.value)
      )
    )

  print(
    anova_tab %>%
      select(
        term,
        df,
        statistic,
        p_fmt
      ) %>%
      kbl(
        format = "html",
        col.names = c(
          "Term",
          "Df",
          "F",
          "p"
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c(
          "striped",
          "hover"
        )
      )
  )

  ############################################################
  ## Participants per group
  ############################################################

  cat("<br><b>Participants per group</b><br>")

  print(
    dat %>%
      count(.data[[predictor]]) %>%
      kbl(
        format = "html",
        col.names = c(
          "Group",
          "N"
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c(
          "striped",
          "condensed"
        )
      )
  )

  ############################################################
  ## Plot
  ############################################################

  p <-
    ggplot(
      dat,
      aes(
        x = .data[[predictor]],
        y = .data[[biomarker]],
        fill = .data[[predictor]]
      )
    ) +
    geom_violin(
      alpha = .25,
      colour = NA,
      trim = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      width = .18,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = .70
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = .10,
      alpha = .60,
      size = 2
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = biomarker
    )

  print(p)

  cat("<hr>")

  invisible(m)
}

##################################################################################################################################################
######################################################################### LONGITUDINAL ANALYSIS ##################################################
##################################################################################################################################################

library(dplyr)

############################################################
## Create binary prenatal risk: i will create a binary PRE risk and substract the number of high risk found in POST to get the change (higher number: high risk of depression longitudinally)
############################################################

long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    EPDS_RISK_PRE_dico = case_when(
      is.na(EPDS_RISK_PRE) ~ NA_real_,
      EPDS_RISK_PRE == "High" ~ 1,
      EPDS_RISK_PRE %in% c("Low","Middle") ~ 0
    )
  )

############################################################
## Change in depression burden
############################################################

long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    EPDS_CHANGE = case_when(
      is.na(EPDS_RISK_PRE_dico) |
      is.na(EPDS_RISK_POST) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~
        as.numeric(as.character(EPDS_RISK_POST)) -
        EPDS_RISK_PRE_dico
    )
  )
############################################################
## Ordered factor for plots
############################################################
long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    EPDS_CHANGE = factor(
      EPDS_CHANGE,
      levels = c(-1,0,1,2,3),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )
############################################################
## QC
############################################################

#long_df %>%
#  distinct(
#    id_bisc,
#    EPDS_RISK_PRE_dico,
#    EPDS_RISK_POST,
#    EPDS_CHANGE
#  ) %>%
#  count(EPDS_CHANGE)


library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

run_epds_change_trajectory <- function(df,
                                       biomarker){

  ############################################################
  ## Data
  ############################################################
  dat <-
    df %>%
    filter(
      Visit %in% c("v2","v3"),
      !is.na(.data[[biomarker]]),
      !is.na(EPDS_CHANGE)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      id_bisc = factor(id_bisc)
    )

  ############################################################
  ## Storage time
  ############################################################

  if(biomarker=="log_pTau217"){
    dat <-
      dat %>%
      mutate(
        storage_time = case_when(
          Visit=="v2" ~
            as.numeric(bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w),
          Visit=="v3" ~
            as.numeric(bl_time.col.store.edta_m_0y)
        )
      )
  }else{
    dat <-
      dat %>%
      mutate(
        storage_time = case_when(
          Visit=="v2" ~
            as.numeric(bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w),
          Visit=="v3" ~
            as.numeric(bl_time.col.store.plas_m_0y)
        )
      )
  }

  ############################################################
  ## Model
  ############################################################

  if(biomarker=="log_NFL"){
    fml <-
      as.formula(
        paste0(
          biomarker,
          " ~ EPDS_CHANGE * (",
          "GA_weeks + ",
          "I(GA_weeks^2) + ",
          "I(GA_weeks^3)",
          ") + ",
          "educ_level_m_2cat + ",
          "hosp_recruit_m_12w + ",
          "age_12w_m + ",
 #         "storage_time + ",
          "(1|id_bisc)"
        )
      )
  }else{
    fml <-
      as.formula(
        paste0(
          biomarker,
          " ~ EPDS_CHANGE * (",
          "GA_weeks + ",
          "I(GA_weeks^2)",
          ") + ",
          "educ_level_m_2cat + ",
          "hosp_recruit_m_12w + ",
          "age_12w_m + ",
#          "storage_time + ",
          "(1|id_bisc)"
        )
      )
  }

  m <-
    lmer(
      fml,
      data = dat,
      REML = TRUE
    )
  ############################################################
  ## Header
  ############################################################

  cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Longitudinal Model (v2+v3):</div>")
  cat("<pre>")
  cat(paste(deparse(fml, width.cutoff = 500), collapse = "\n"))
  cat("</pre>")
  cat(
    paste0(
      "<b>Participants:</b> ",
      n_distinct(dat$id_bisc),
      "<br>",
      "<b>Observations:</b> ",
      nrow(dat),
      "<br><br>"
    )
  )
  ############################################################
  ## Table
  ############################################################
  tab <-
    broom.mixed::tidy(
      m,
      effects="fixed"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      estimate=round(estimate,3),
      std.error=round(std.error,3),
      statistic=round(statistic,2),
      p_fmt=
        ifelse(
          p.value<0.001,
          "<0.001",
          sprintf("%.3f",p.value)
        ),
      signif=
        case_when(
          p.value<0.001~"***",
          p.value<0.01~"**",
          p.value<0.05~"*",
          TRUE~""
        )
    )
  print(
    tab %>%
      select(
        term,
        estimate,
        std.error,
        statistic,
        p_fmt,
        signif
      ) %>%
      kbl(
        format="html",
        col.names=c(
          "Term",
          "Beta",
          "SE",
          "t",
          "p",
          "Sig."
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width=FALSE,
        bootstrap_options=c(
          "striped",
          "hover",
          "condensed"
        )
      )
  )

  ############################################################
  ## Plot
  ############################################################

  dat$EPDS_GROUP <-
    factor(
      dat$EPDS_CHANGE,
      ordered=TRUE
    )
  p <-
    ggplot(
      dat,
      aes(
        GA_weeks,
        .data[[biomarker]],
        colour=EPDS_GROUP
      )
    )+
    geom_smooth(
      method="loess",
      se=TRUE,
      linewidth=1.2
    )+
    theme_minimal(base_size=13)+
    labs(
      colour="EPDS change",
      x="Gestational age (weeks)",
      y=biomarker
    )
  print(p)
  invisible(m)
}
```

##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r epds ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_pTau217",
  visit = "v2"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_pTau217",
  visit = "v3"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_change_trajectory(
  long_df,
  "log_pTau217"
)
```


##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r epds nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_NFL",
  visit = "v2"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_NFL",
  visit = "v3"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_change_trajectory(
  long_df,
  "log_NFL"
)
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r epds gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_GFAP",
  visit = "v2"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_cross(
  long_df,
  biomarker = "log_GFAP",
  visit = "v3"
)

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

run_epds_change_trajectory(
  long_df,
  "log_GFAP"
)
```

#### SCL90r {.tabset}

We will use a negative binomial because is zero-inflated.

```{r scl90r general, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,fig.show='hold', fig.keep='all'}

# i had some errors with the functions, so i will apply the model directly in each case

library(dplyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat20 <- long_df %>%
  filter(Visit == "v2") %>%
  mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(bl_date.extr_m_32w) -
        as.Date(date_scl90r_m_20w)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(scl_total_m_20w),
    !is.na(log_pTau217),
    !is.na(age_12w_m),
    !is.na(educ_level_m_2cat),
    !is.na(hosp_recruit_m_12w),
    !is.na(bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w),
    !is.na(lag_days)
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

#n_distinct(dat20$id_bisc)
#nrow(dat20)
```


##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r scl90r ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

############################################################
## pTau217 V2 (12-20w)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat20_ptau <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v2") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(bl_date.extr_m_32w) -
          as.Date(date_scl90r_m_20w)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_20w,
    log_pTau217,
    age_12w_m,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w,
    lag_days
  )

dat20_ptau$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat20_ptau$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat20_ptau$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat20_ptau$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m20_ptau <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_20w ~
    log_pTau217 +
    age_12w_m +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    bl_edta.time.col.stor_m_32w +
    lag_days,
  data = dat20_ptau
)

############################################################
## Header
############################################################

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v2):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m20_ptau)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat20_ptau$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat20_ptau),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m20_ptau),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

############################################################
## Table
############################################################

tab20_ptau <- broom::tidy(m20_ptau)

tab20_ptau$IRR <- exp(tab20_ptau$estimate)
tab20_ptau$Lower95 <- exp(tab20_ptau$estimate - 1.96*tab20_ptau$std.error)
tab20_ptau$Upper95 <- exp(tab20_ptau$estimate + 1.96*tab20_ptau$std.error)

tab20_ptau$IRR <- round(tab20_ptau$IRR,3)
tab20_ptau$Lower95 <- round(tab20_ptau$Lower95,3)
tab20_ptau$Upper95 <- round(tab20_ptau$Upper95,3)
tab20_ptau$statistic <- round(tab20_ptau$statistic,2)

tab20_ptau$p <- ifelse(
  tab20_ptau$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab20_ptau$p.value)
)

tab20_ptau$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab20_ptau$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab20_ptau$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab20_ptau$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab20_ptau <- tab20_ptau[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab20_ptau,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","Sig.")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

############################################################
## Plot
############################################################

ggplot(
  dat20_ptau,
  aes(log_pTau217, scl_total_m_20w)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    width=0,
    height=.15,
    alpha=.6,
    size=2
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m20_ptau$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE,
    colour="#3B7EA1",
    linewidth=1.1
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  labs(
    x="log_pTau217",
    y="SCL90-R total score"
  )

cat("<hr>")


cat("--------------------------------------\n")

############################################################
## pTau217 V4 (4 years)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat4_ptau <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v4") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(extraction_date) -
          as.Date(date_scl90r_m_48m)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_y4,
    log_pTau217,
    age_12w_m,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    bl_edta.time.col.freez_c_4y,
    lag_days
  )

dat4_ptau$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat4_ptau$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat4_ptau$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat4_ptau$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m4_ptau <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_y4 ~
    log_pTau217 +
    age_12w_m +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    bl_edta.time.col.freez_c_4y +
    lag_days,
  data = dat4_ptau
)

############################################################
## Header
############################################################

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v4):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m4_ptau)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat4_ptau$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat4_ptau),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m4_ptau),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

############################################################
## Table
############################################################

tab4_ptau <- broom::tidy(m4_ptau)

tab4_ptau$IRR <- exp(tab4_ptau$estimate)
tab4_ptau$Lower95 <- exp(tab4_ptau$estimate - 1.96*tab4_ptau$std.error)
tab4_ptau$Upper95 <- exp(tab4_ptau$estimate + 1.96*tab4_ptau$std.error)

tab4_ptau$IRR <- round(tab4_ptau$IRR,3)
tab4_ptau$Lower95 <- round(tab4_ptau$Lower95,3)
tab4_ptau$Upper95 <- round(tab4_ptau$Upper95,3)
tab4_ptau$statistic <- round(tab4_ptau$statistic,2)

tab4_ptau$p <- ifelse(
  tab4_ptau$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab4_ptau$p.value)
)

tab4_ptau$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab4_ptau$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab4_ptau$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab4_ptau$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab4_ptau <- tab4_ptau[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab4_ptau,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","Sig.")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

############################################################
## Plot
############################################################

ggplot(
  dat4_ptau,
  aes(log_pTau217, scl_total_m_y4)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    width=0,
    height=.15,
    alpha=.6,
    size=2
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m4_ptau$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE,
    colour="#3B7EA1",
    linewidth=1.1
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  labs(
    x="log_pTau217",
    y="SCL90-R total score"
  )

cat("<hr>")
```

##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r scl90r nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
############################################################
## NFL V2 (12-20w)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat20_nfl <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v2") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(bl_date.extr_m_32w) -
          as.Date(date_scl90r_m_20w)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_20w,
    log_NFL,
    age_12w_m,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w,
    lag_days
  )

dat20_nfl$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat20_nfl$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat20_nfl$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat20_nfl$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m20_nfl <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_20w ~
    log_NFL +
    age_12w_m +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w +
    lag_days,
  data = dat20_nfl
)

############################################################
## Header
############################################################

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v2):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m20_nfl)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat20_nfl$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat20_nfl),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m20_nfl),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

############################################################
## Table
############################################################

tab20_nfl <- broom::tidy(m20_nfl)

tab20_nfl$IRR <- exp(tab20_nfl$estimate)
tab20_nfl$Lower95 <- exp(tab20_nfl$estimate - 1.96*tab20_nfl$std.error)
tab20_nfl$Upper95 <- exp(tab20_nfl$estimate + 1.96*tab20_nfl$std.error)

tab20_nfl$IRR <- round(tab20_nfl$IRR,3)
tab20_nfl$Lower95 <- round(tab20_nfl$Lower95,3)
tab20_nfl$Upper95 <- round(tab20_nfl$Upper95,3)
tab20_nfl$statistic <- round(tab20_nfl$statistic,2)

tab20_nfl$p <- ifelse(
  tab20_nfl$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab20_nfl$p.value)
)

tab20_nfl$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab20_nfl$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab20_nfl$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab20_nfl$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab20_nfl <- tab20_nfl[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab20_nfl,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","Sig.")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

############################################################
## Plot
############################################################

ggplot(
  dat20_nfl,
  aes(log_NFL, scl_total_m_20w)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    width=0,
    height=.15,
    alpha=.6,
    size=2
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m20_nfl$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE,
    colour="#3B7EA1",
    linewidth=1.1
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  labs(
    x="log_NFL",
    y="SCL90-R total score"
  )

cat("<hr>")

cat("--------------------------------------\n")


############################################################
## NFL V4 (4 years)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat4_nfl <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v4") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(extraction_date) -
          as.Date(date_scl90r_m_48m)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_y4,
    log_NFL,
    age_12w_m,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y,
    lag_days
  )

dat4_nfl$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat4_nfl$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat4_nfl$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat4_nfl$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m4_nfl <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_y4 ~
    log_NFL +
    age_12w_m +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y +
    lag_days,
  data = dat4_nfl
)

############################################################
## Header
############################################################

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v4):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m4_nfl)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat4_nfl$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat4_nfl),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m4_nfl),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

############################################################
## Table
############################################################

tab4_nfl <- broom::tidy(m4_nfl)

tab4_nfl$IRR <- exp(tab4_nfl$estimate)
tab4_nfl$Lower95 <- exp(tab4_nfl$estimate - 1.96*tab4_nfl$std.error)
tab4_nfl$Upper95 <- exp(tab4_nfl$estimate + 1.96*tab4_nfl$std.error)

tab4_nfl$IRR <- round(tab4_nfl$IRR,3)
tab4_nfl$Lower95 <- round(tab4_nfl$Lower95,3)
tab4_nfl$Upper95 <- round(tab4_nfl$Upper95,3)
tab4_nfl$statistic <- round(tab4_nfl$statistic,2)

tab4_nfl$p <- ifelse(
  tab4_nfl$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab4_nfl$p.value)
)

tab4_nfl$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab4_nfl$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab4_nfl$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab4_nfl$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab4_nfl <- tab4_nfl[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab4_nfl,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","Sig.")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

############################################################
## Plot
############################################################

ggplot(
  dat4_nfl,
  aes(log_NFL, scl_total_m_y4)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    width=0,
    height=.15,
    alpha=.6,
    size=2
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m4_nfl$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE,
    colour="#3B7EA1",
    linewidth=1.1
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  labs(
    x="log_NFL",
    y="SCL90-R total score"
  )

cat("<hr>")
```

##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r scl90r gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.show='hold'}
############################################################
## GFAP V2 (20w SCL90R vs 32w biomarker)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat20_gfap <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v2") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(bl_date.extr_m_32w) -
        as.Date(date_scl90r_m_20w)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_20w,
    log_GFAP,
    age_12w_m,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w,
    lag_days
  )

dat20_gfap$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat20_gfap$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat20_gfap$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat20_gfap$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m20_gfap <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_20w ~
    log_GFAP +
    age_12w_m +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    bl_plas.time.col.stor_m_32w +
    lag_days,
  data = dat20_gfap
)

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v2):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m20_gfap)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat20_gfap$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat20_gfap),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m20_gfap),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

tab20_gfap <- broom::tidy(m20_gfap)

tab20_gfap$IRR <- exp(tab20_gfap$estimate)
tab20_gfap$Lower95 <- exp(tab20_gfap$estimate - 1.96*tab20_gfap$std.error)
tab20_gfap$Upper95 <- exp(tab20_gfap$estimate + 1.96*tab20_gfap$std.error)

tab20_gfap$IRR <- round(tab20_gfap$IRR,3)
tab20_gfap$Lower95 <- round(tab20_gfap$Lower95,3)
tab20_gfap$Upper95 <- round(tab20_gfap$Upper95,3)
tab20_gfap$statistic <- round(tab20_gfap$statistic,2)

tab20_gfap$p <- ifelse(
  tab20_gfap$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab20_gfap$p.value)
)

tab20_gfap$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab20_gfap$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab20_gfap$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab20_gfap$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab20_gfap <- tab20_gfap[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab20_gfap,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

ggplot(
  dat20_gfap,
  aes(log_GFAP, scl_total_m_20w)
) +
  geom_jitter(height=.15,width=0,alpha=.6) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m20_gfap$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

cat("<hr>")

cat("--------------------------------------\n")

############################################################
## GFAP V4 (4y SCL90R vs 4y biomarker)
############################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)

dat4_gfap <- long_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Visit == "v4") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lag_days = abs(
      as.numeric(
        as.Date(extraction_date) -
        as.Date(date_scl90r_m_48m)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(
    scl_total_m_y4,
    log_GFAP,
    age_12w_m,
    hosp_recruit_m_12w,
    educ_level_m_2cat,
    bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y,
    lag_days
  )

dat4_gfap$educ_level_m_2cat <- droplevels(dat4_gfap$educ_level_m_2cat)
dat4_gfap$hosp_recruit_m_12w <- droplevels(dat4_gfap$hosp_recruit_m_12w)

m4_gfap <- MASS::glm.nb(
  scl_total_m_y4 ~
    log_GFAP +
    age_12w_m +
    hosp_recruit_m_12w +
    educ_level_m_2cat +
    bl_sg.time.col.freez_c_4y +
    lag_days,
  data = dat4_gfap
)

cat("<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px'>Negative Binomial model (v4):</div>")

cat("<pre>")
cat(paste(deparse(formula(m4_gfap)), collapse="\n"))
cat("</pre><br>")

cat(
  paste0(
    "<b>N participants:</b> ", dplyr::n_distinct(dat4_gfap$id_bisc),
    "<br>",
    "<b>N observations:</b> ", nrow(dat4_gfap),
    "<br>",
    "<b>AIC:</b> ", round(AIC(m4_gfap),1),
    "<br><br>"
  )
)

tab4_gfap <- broom::tidy(m4_gfap)

tab4_gfap$IRR <- exp(tab4_gfap$estimate)
tab4_gfap$Lower95 <- exp(tab4_gfap$estimate - 1.96*tab4_gfap$std.error)
tab4_gfap$Upper95 <- exp(tab4_gfap$estimate + 1.96*tab4_gfap$std.error)

tab4_gfap$IRR <- round(tab4_gfap$IRR,3)
tab4_gfap$Lower95 <- round(tab4_gfap$Lower95,3)
tab4_gfap$Upper95 <- round(tab4_gfap$Upper95,3)
tab4_gfap$statistic <- round(tab4_gfap$statistic,2)

tab4_gfap$p <- ifelse(
  tab4_gfap$p.value < .001,
  "<0.001",
  sprintf("%.3f",tab4_gfap$p.value)
)

tab4_gfap$Sig <- ifelse(
  tab4_gfap$p.value < .001,"***",
  ifelse(tab4_gfap$p.value < .01,"**",
         ifelse(tab4_gfap$p.value < .05,"*",""))
)

tab4_gfap <- tab4_gfap[,c(
  "term","IRR","Lower95","Upper95","statistic","p","Sig"
)]

knitr::kable(
  tab4_gfap,
  format="html",
  escape=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Term","IRR","2.5%","97.5%","z","p","")
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width=FALSE,
    bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed")
  )

ggplot(
  dat4_gfap,
  aes(log_GFAP, scl_total_m_y4)
) +
  geom_jitter(height=.15,width=0,alpha=.6) +
  geom_smooth(
    method="glm",
    method.args=list(
      family=MASS::negative.binomial(theta=m4_gfap$theta)
    ),
    se=TRUE
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

cat("<hr>")
```
